chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No.D- 3452 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of cases 1. For orders on CMA 4690/25 2. For orders on CMA 4691/25 3. For orders on CMA 4692/25 29.07.2025 Ghulam Nabi (petitioner No.8) is present in person..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Through this application, petiotner No.8/applicant seeks review of order dated 15.07.2025, whereby the restoration application being time- barred was dismissed in the following terms: “Since this petition was dismissed for non-prosecution vide order dated 24.09.2020, the petiotner has now filed the present application in the year 2025, after an inordinate delay of approximately five years, which is hopelessly time-barred. Even on merits, the petitioners claim to have been declared successful in the written examination but were declared unsuccessful in the viva voce/interview. The recruitment process for the post of ASI in Sindh Police commenced in the year 2013, and we are now in the year 2025, thus, the said recruitment process has long been concluded. Accordingly, the application for restoration of the petition in hand is devoid of merit and is hereby dismissed along with the listed CMA, with no order as to costs”. The petitioner No.8/applicant has not been able to make out a case warranting indulgence of the Court. No ground for review is made out. Accordingly, this review application is dismissed, with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E Ahmad/PS
